- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)

- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an 'x' -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have removed console.logs/print statements (or they are intentional)

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally
- [ ] I have tested all changes manually
- [ ] I have tested on multiple browsers (if frontend change)
- [ ] I have tested edge cases

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated code comments where needed
- [ ] I have updated the README if functionality changed

### Git

- [ ] My commits follow the conventional commit format
- [ ] I have rebased on the latest main branch
- [ ] I have resolved all merge conflicts
- [ ] My branch is up-to-date with the base branch
